user_context: i thought i forget her but every night i saw her in dream
hook: ye toh reet ho gayi aakhiri dream pe
slide2: Uske bina so nai kar paata. Jaise phone charge nahi ho toh 1% pe roka hoon, waise hi main 0% pe roka hai.
slide3: Saans toh le raha hoon lekin lagta hai jaise dil ki battery khatam ho gayi ho. Subah uth ke dekhta hoon uska naam screen pe chhup raha ho.
slide4: Dreams me usko dekha toh subah use hi delete kar diya. Par woh toh meri phone ke recycle bin se bhi uth ke aa rahi hai.
caption: Yeh wahi cheez hai na jiske baare me log bolte hain 'time heal kar dega'? Par time toh just ek button hai, click karte hi badal jaata hai. Pyar nahi badalta. Aap kya sochte ho?
